# INSTRUCTIONS (generic base)

This is a clean, repo-agnostic onboarding doc. It mentions learnings and
clickstops in generic prose, and uses placeholders like LRN-NNN and CSNN
that must never be flagged.

## Hard rules

- File ownership: own only your declared files.
- No-commit preflight when running as a sub-agent.

<!-- harness:local-start id=instructions.harness -->
Harness self-host content may legitimately keep institutional anchors here:
see LRN-068 and CS54 for the briefing-preamble doctrine.
<!-- harness:local-end id=instructions.harness -->

## Per-CS loop

Claim, branch, dispatch, implement, review, merge.
